M-007.NAME: routing
M-007.owns: tunnel health check, simplified routing status (Full Tunnel)

exports.RoutingManager: Simple tunnel health manager with initialize() and get_status()

removed.note: Removed in Phase-17 Step-1: ipset logic no longer needed in Full Tunnel

M-007.hotspot: H-002: Routing is host-coupled — changes can mutate live system state

change-summary.entry: Phase-17 Step-1: Simplified to Full Tunnel. Removed split-tunneling, ipset, policy resolver logic. Only health check remains.
